home.heroKicker: Southeast Asia tours, guided by locals
home.heroDesc: From the mountains of Chiang Mai to the temple sea of Bagan, we design trips one route at a time — not off-the-shelf packages. Book instantly or request a fully tailor-made quote.
home.why1Desc: Not an off-the-shelf package — every trip is curated by guides who actually know the area.
home.why2Desc: Book and get a confirmation email immediately, with our team following up within 24 hours.
home.why3Desc: Every trip includes travel insurance and vetted local guides.
home.ctaDesc: Our team is ready to help plan the right trip for you.

tours.title: Our Tours
tours.desc: Choose the route that's right for you. Every trip is guided locally and can be customized to your needs.
tours.noResults: No tours in this filter yet — try a different one.

tourDetail.hotelEmpty: No hotel information for this tour yet — contact our team for details.
tourDetail.priceNote: Prices below are indicative. Your final quote will depend on your specific requirements and travel dates.
tourDetail.personalizeBoxDesc: None of our trips are one-size-fits-all — use the "Request a Quote" form to tell us what you need, and our team will build a program just for you.

booking.quoteTitle: Request a Quote For This Trip
booking.quoteNote: Prices shown are indicative — our team will tailor a quote to your needs and send it by email.
booking.name: Full Name
booking.notesPlaceholderQuote: Special requests, budget, preferred hotel class, etc.
booking.disclaimerBooking: This is an initial request — our team will follow up by email to confirm.
booking.disclaimerQuote: Our team will get back to you with a tailored quote.
booking.askQuoteButton: Request a Quote From This Agent
booking.askQuoteNote: Our local team is ready to tailor this trip for you.
booking.fixedDeparturesNote: This is a group tour with fixed departure dates — choose from the dates available.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.introGeneral: Have a question about a trip, or want a custom group tour? Send us a message.
contact.introPersonalize: Tell us what you're looking for — group size, budget, or travel dates — and our team will design a trip just for you.
contact.formSubjectPlaceholder: e.g. Question about the Chiang Mai tour

personalize.title: Your Own Custom Tour
personalize.desc: Tailor your trip exactly the way you want it. Give us a few details and we'll design it just for you.
personalize.flightNoticeTitle: This custom tour does not include the international flight.
personalize.flightNoticeNo: No (I'd like help with flights too)
personalize.tripLengthDays: How many days will you spend in Thailand?
personalize.arrivalDate: What date will you arrive in Thailand?
personalize.departureDate: What date will you depart from Thailand?
personalize.guidePreference: Do you need a private tour guide?
personalize.guideCarOnly: We only need a private car with driver
personalize.currency: What currency would you like to use?
personalize.budgetPerPerson: How much budget per person (not including international flight)
personalize.placesOfInterest: Do you have any place/activity which you'd like to visit?
personalize.placesOfInterestPlaceholder: e.g. diving, Wat Phra Kaew, floating markets, etc.
personalize.responseNote: We'll reply with a quote within 24 hours

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.submitSuccessDesc: Thanks for sharing — our team will review it before it appears on the site.
reviews.moderationNote: Your review will be checked by our team before it appears on the site.

fiveSteps.title: 5 Steps to Your Dream Trip
fiveSteps.step1Desc: Fill out our free quote request form
fiveSteps.step2Desc: Get your quote and revise it until it's just right
fiveSteps.step3Desc: Confirm the itinerary and place a deposit
fiveSteps.step4Desc: Our team arranges hotels, transport, and guides
fiveSteps.step5Desc: Pack your bags — you're ready to go!

footer.tagline: We design travel routes across Southeast Asia with local guides and attention to every detail, from the first day to the last. Every trip can be tailored to your needs.

floatingContact.title: Get in touch instantly
floatingContact.whatsappGreeting: Hi! I'd like to ask about a tour.

about.title: About November Trip
about.intro: November Trip was founded on the belief that the best trips are designed together with people who live there. We work with local guides across Thailand — from the north to the south, the central plains to the northeast — to build trips that are educational, fun, and sustainable for the communities we visit.
about.value1Desc: No two trips are exactly alike — everything adapts to your travel group.
about.value2Desc: From accommodation to meals, we personally curate every touchpoint.
about.value3Desc: Supporting local communities and reducing our environmental impact.

meta.description: {company} — we design trekking, cultural, and cruise trips, with instant online booking and email confirmation.

whatsappChat.waitingMessage: Your first message opened in WhatsApp for you to send. The team will reply here shortly.
whatsappChat.replyNote: Extra messages will also open WhatsApp for you to send, so the team is sure to see and reply to them.
whatsappChat.messagePlaceholder: Type the message you'd like to send...
whatsappChat.startNote: This opens WhatsApp for you to send the first message yourself (required by WhatsApp) — after that, the team can reply right here.
